name: 洛阳
description: Luoyang, one of China's ancient capitals, is famous for the Longmen Grottoes (UNESCO), the Shaolin Temple, and peony flowers. A cradle of Chinese civilization with over 5,000 years of history, it served as capital for thirteen dynasties.
highlights: Shaolin Temple - Birthplace of Kung Fu
White Horse Temple - First Buddhist temple in China

climate.tips: Best in spring for peonies. Autumn for pleasant weather. Summers hot. Spring festival (April) is peak tourist season.

attractions.name: 龙门石窟
attractions.description: UNESCO World Heritage - massive Buddhist cave complex with 100,000+ sculptures.
attractions.tips: Arrive early to avoid crowds. Take boat ride for different view. Wear comfortable shoes.

attractions.name: 少林寺
attractions.description: Birthplace of Chinese martial arts and Zen Buddhism, with famous kung fu performances.
attractions.tips: Watch the kung fu show. Arrive early. Combine with Songshan hiking.

attractions.name: 白马寺
attractions.description: China's first Buddhist temple, founded in 68 AD, with contributions from India and Southeast Asia.
attractions.tips: The birthplace of Chinese Buddhism. Combine with Luoyang old town.

attractions.name: 洛阳博物馆
attractions.description: Excellent museum showcasing ancient capital history with over 40,000 artifacts.
attractions.tips: Allow 2-3 hours. Audio guide available. Don't miss the tri-color pottery.

attractions.name: 关林
attractions.description: Temple dedicated to Guan Yu, where his remains are buried, largest such temple in China.
attractions.tips: Learn about Guan Yu's legendary stories. The ancient trees are impressive.

attractions.name: 老城十字街
attractions.description: Historic streets with traditional architecture, lanterns and local snacks.
attractions.tips: Best at night when illuminated. Try local snacks. Buy souvenirs.

attractions.name: 丽景门
attractions.description: Iconic gate of Luoyang with well-preserved city wall section.
attractions.tips: Walk the city wall at sunset. Best at night with lighting.

attractions.name: 天堂明堂
attractions.description: reconstructed Tang Dynasty palaces with large rotating stage show.
attractions.tips: Watch the evening performance. Arrive before show time. Great photo opportunities.

attractions.name: 洛阳国家牡丹园
attractions.description: Largest peony garden in China with 400+ varieties of the city flower.
attractions.tips: Visit during Peony Festival (April-May). The flowers are spectacular.

attractions.name: 古墓博物馆
attractions.description: Unique museum with underground ancient tombs you can walk through.
attractions.tips: Walk through actual tombs underground. Learn about ancient burial practices.

attractions.name: 周公庙
attractions.description: Temple dedicated to the Duke of Zhou, founder of the Zhou Dynasty.
attractions.tips: For history enthusiasts. Quiet compared to other temples.

attractions.name: 上清宫
attractions.description: Taoist temple on a hilltop with panoramic views of Luoyang.
attractions.tips: Great views of the city. Combine with nearby sites. Peaceful atmosphere.

attractions.name: 应天门
attractions.description: Reconstructed Tang Dynasty gate with impressive scale and evening light show.
attractions.tips: Best at night. Watch the light show. Great photo opportunities.

attractions.name: 嵩山
attractions.description: One of the Sacred Mountains of China with Shaolin Temple and stunning scenery.
attractions.tips: Combine with Shaolin Temple. Allow 2 days for full experience. Hiking required.

attractions.name: 神州牡丹园
attractions.description: Large peony garden with many rare varieties and beautiful scenery.
attractions.tips: Best in April-May. Different varieties bloom at different times.

attractions.name: 洛浦公园
attractions.description: Large riverside park along the Luo River with gardens and walking paths.
attractions.tips: Great for evening walks. Beautiful sunset over the river.

attractions.name: 中岳庙
attractions.description: Main temple on Songshan dedicated to the mountain itself.
attractions.tips: Combine with Songshan hike. Ancient and atmospheric.

attractions.name: 永泰寺
attractions.description: Ancient Buddhist nunnery on Songshan with over 1,500-year history.
attractions.tips: Atmospheric and peaceful. Meet the nuns. Unique experience.

attractions.name: 塔林
attractions.description: Over 240 ancient Buddhist pagodas at Shaolin Temple, second largest in China.
attractions.tips: The pagodas date from Tang to Qing dynasties. Impressive number.

attractions.name: 香山寺
attractions.description: Beautiful hilltop Buddhist temple near Longmen Grottoes.
attractions.tips: Great views of Longmen. Combine with grottoes visit. Peaceful.

attractions.name: 二里头遗址
attractions.description: Ruins of the earliest Chinese civilization capital, over 3,800 years old.
attractions.tips: For history enthusiasts. Learn about China's earliest capitals.

attractions.name: 天子驾六博物馆
attractions.description: Museum housing ancient chariot burial pits from Eastern Zhou period.
attractions.tips: See actual chariot remains. Small but interesting.

attractions.name: 龙潭大峡谷
attractions.description: Scenic canyon with waterfalls, pools and dramatic rock formations.
attractions.tips: Full day trip from Luoyang. Wear hiking shoes. Great scenery.

attractions.name: 西霞山
attractions.description: Scenic mountain area with waterfalls and hiking trails.
attractions.tips: Great for nature lovers. Full day trip. Bring water and snacks.

attractions.name: 龙门石窟
attractions.description: 世界文化遗产，中国四大石窟之一，有10万余尊佛像。
attractions.tips: 中国石刻艺术宝库。

attractions.name: 白马寺
attractions.description: 中国第一古刹，佛教传入中国后兴建的第一座官办寺院。
attractions.tips: 了解佛教传入中国的历史。

attractions.name: 老君山
attractions.description: 道教名山，有金顶道观群，被誉为天下无双圣境。
attractions.tips: 秋季云海最美。

attractions.name: 洛阳博物馆
attractions.description: 展示洛阳十三朝古都历史的博物馆。
attractions.tips: 了解洛阳历史。

attractions.name: 丽景门
attractions.description: 洛阳古城的标志性建筑，始建于隋代。
attractions.tips: 了解洛阳古城。

attractions.name: 洛阳老街
attractions.description: 洛阳最古老的商业街，有各种小吃和特产。
attractions.tips: 品尝洛阳水席。

attractions.name: 关林
attractions.description: 中国唯一的冢、庙、林三祀合一的古建筑群，埋葬关羽首级。
attractions.tips: 了解三国文化。

attractions.name: 天子驾六博物馆
attractions.description: 展示东周天子驾六车马坑的博物馆。
attractions.tips: 了解东周历史。

attractions.name: 王城公园
attractions.description: 洛阳最大的公园，有牡丹园和动物园。
attractions.tips: 4月牡丹最美。

attractions.name: 中国国花园
attractions.description: 中国最大的牡丹观赏园，有1000多个品种。
attractions.tips: 4月中旬最佳。

attractions.name: 少林寺
attractions.description: 中国佛教禅宗祖庭，少林武术发源地。
attractions.tips: 观看少林武术表演。

attractions.name: 嵩山
attractions.description: 五岳之中岳，有少林寺和嵩阳书院。
attractions.tips: 了解嵩山文化。

attractions.name: 云台山
attractions.description: 世界地质公园，有红石峡和潭瀑峡。
attractions.tips: 秋季红叶最美。

attractions.name: 白云山
attractions.description: 国家级森林公园，有玉皇顶和白云湖。
attractions.tips: 夏季避暑。

attractions.name: 鸡公山
attractions.description: 中国四大避暑胜地之一，有万国建筑博览之称。
attractions.tips: 夏季最佳。

attractions.name: 龙潭大峡谷
attractions.description: 世界地质公园，有罕见的水蚀地貌。
attractions.tips: 夏季最佳。

attractions.name: 洛阳水席
attractions.description: 洛阳传统名宴，有24道菜，以汤水为主。
attractions.tips: 品尝洛阳特色。

attractions.name: 白云山国家森林公园
attractions.description: 洛阳南部的天然氧吧。
attractions.tips: 夏季避暑。

attractions.name: 邙山
attractions.description: 洛阳北部的山脉，有大量古墓群。
attractions.tips: 了解洛阳历史。

attractions.name: 洛阳夜景
attractions.description: 丽景门和洛邑古城的夜景灯光秀。
attractions.tips: 夏季夜间最美。

attractions.name: 偃师商城遗址
attractions.description: 商代早期都城遗址。
attractions.tips: 了解商代历史。

attractions.name: 洛邑古城
attractions.description: 洛阳新开发的历史文化街区。
attractions.tips: 穿汉服拍照。

attractions.name: 嵩阳书院
attractions.description: 中国四大书院之一，有4500年历史的古柏树。
attractions.tips: 了解古代教育。

attractions.name: 中岳庙
attractions.description: 五岳之中岳的主庙，有2000多年历史。
attractions.tips: 了解道教文化。

attractions.name: 古墓博物馆
attractions.description: 中国最大的古墓博物馆，搬迁复原了25座古墓。
attractions.tips: 了解丧葬文化。

attractions.name: 黄河小浪底
attractions.description: 黄河上的大型水利枢纽，可观赏泄洪壮观景象。
attractions.tips: 泄洪期6-7月最壮观。

restaurants.name: 真不同
restaurants.description: Famous restaurant serving traditional Luoyang water banquet dishes.

restaurants.name: 洛阳水席园
restaurants.description: Best place for authentic Luoyang water banquet.

restaurants.name: 十字街夜市
restaurants.description: Famous night market with variety of local and international food.

restaurants.name: 南关杂肝汤
restaurants.description: Famous breakfast soup shop, local institution since 1920s.

restaurants.name: 管记水席
restaurants.description: Authentic water banquet in family-run restaurant.

restaurants.name: 东关周记
restaurants.description: Popular for traditional Luoyang noodles and soup.

restaurants.name: 牡丹燕菜
restaurants.description: Famous Luoyang dish made from taro and local ingredients.

restaurants.name: 牛肉汤
restaurants.description: Rich beef soup - popular breakfast in Luoyang.

restaurants.name: 烫面角
restaurants.description: Steamed dumplings with hot filling - Luoyang specialty.

restaurants.name: 洛阳酒家
restaurants.description: High-end restaurant serving refined Luoyang cuisine.

restaurants.name: 少林素饼
restaurants.description: Famous vegetarian pastries from Shaolin area.

restaurants.name: 嵩山土菜
restaurants.description: Mountain village restaurant with local dishes.

restaurants.name: 羊肉汤
restaurants.description: Rich lamb soup - another popular breakfast option.

restaurants.name: 糊涂面
restaurants.description: Thick noodles with vegetables - simple local dish.

restaurants.name: 洛阳汤面
restaurants.description: Various noodle soups specific to Luoyang.

restaurants.name: 锅贴
restaurants.description: Pan-fried dumplings - popular street food.

restaurants.name: 炒凉粉
restaurants.description: Stir-fried rice jelly - famous Luoyang street snack.

restaurants.name: 不翻汤
restaurants.description: Pancake and soup combination - traditional Luoyang snack.

restaurants.name: 鲤鱼跃龙门
restaurants.description: Famous dish of carp prepared in traditional style.

restaurants.name: 豆腐汤
restaurants.description: Light tofu soup - popular breakfast.

restaurants.name: 炸麻球
restaurants.description: Crispy sesame ball dessert - common snack.

restaurants.name: 蜜汁糖藕
restaurants.description: Sweet lotus root - traditional dessert.

restaurants.name: 灌汤包
restaurants.description: Juicy soup dumplings - popular throughout China.

restaurants.name: 老城饺子
restaurants.description: Handmade dumplings with various traditional fillings.

restaurants.name: 洛阳大排档
restaurants.description: Various food stalls open late at night.

arrival.tips: Airport 10km from city center. Airport bus (15¥) or taxi (50¥) to city.

arrival.to: Luoyang Railway Station / Luoyang Longmen Station
arrival.tips: Luoyang Longmen for high-speed from Zhengzhou. Both stations have bus connections.

hotels.name: 洛阳钼都利豪酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Book during off-peak season. Good location for sightseeing.

hotels.name: 洛阳华阳广场国际大饭店
hotels.bookingTips: Book during off-peak. Good for transport.

hotels.name: 洛阳牡丹大酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Perfect for old city exploration. Book during off-peak.

hotels.name: 如家酒店洛阳老城十字街店
hotels.bookingTips: Best budget option in old city area.

hotels.name: 洛阳开元名都大酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Book direct for best rates. Good business hotel.

hotels.name: 洛阳亚朵酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Popular Chinese boutique chain. Great value.

hotels.name: 嵩山少林寺酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Perfect for Shaolin Temple visits. Book during off-peak.

hotels.name: 洛阳牡丹城酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Book during off-peak. Good for sightseeing.

hotels.name: 洛阳西工饭店
hotels.bookingTips: Best budget option in central area.

hotels.name: 洛阳航空城酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Perfect for early flights. Book airport shuttle.

hotels.name: 洛阳温泉山庄
hotels.bookingTips: Perfect for relaxation. Book spa packages.

hotels.name: 洛阳白马寺客栈
hotels.bookingTips: Great for temple visits. Experience local life.

culturalTips.title: Ancient Capital
culturalTips.content: Luoyang served as capital for 13 dynasties over 5,000 years, making it one of China's most historically significant cities. The Longmen Grottoes and White Horse Temple are remnants of this glorious past.

culturalTips.title: Birthplace of Chinese Buddhism
culturalTips.content: White Horse Temple is China's first Buddhist temple, established in 68 AD when Buddhism entered China. Luoyang became the center of Chinese Buddhism.

culturalTips.title: Kung Fu Birthplace
culturalTips.content: The Shaolin Temple is recognized as the birthplace of Chinese martial arts (kung fu). Monks have practiced martial arts here for over 1,500 years.

culturalTips.title: Luoyang Water Banquet
culturalTips.content: The famous 'water banquet' (水席) consists of 24 dishes served in sequence, each with broth or soup as the main component. Must-try for visitors.

culturalTips.title: City Flower
culturalTips.content: Luoyang is famous for peonies. The Peony Festival in April-May draws millions of visitors. The flowers are considered symbols of wealth and honor.

culturalTips.title: Longmen Grottoes
culturalTips.content: The Longmen Grottoes contain over 100,000 Buddhist statues carved into mountainside cliffs. The largest is 17 meters tall. A UNESCO World Heritage Site.

culturalTips.title: Tang Dynasty Legacy
culturalTips.content: Luoyang was a major capital during the Tang Dynasty, China's golden age. The Tang period saw great cultural flourishing in art, poetry and religion.

culturalTips.title: Terracotta Warriors Connection
culturalTips.content: Luoyang's connection to the Longmen Grottoes and ancient capitals makes it a complement to Xi'an's Terracotta Warriors. Both cities showcase China's imperial history.

culturalTips.title: Shaolin Kung Fu School
culturalTips.content: Many international visitors come to Luoyang specifically to train at Shaolin Temple. Kung fu schools offer programs ranging from a few days to several months.

culturalTips.title: Peony Flower Dish
culturalTips.content: Peony yan cai (牡丹燕菜) is Luoyang's signature dish, made from taro and named after the city flower. It's a must-try at traditional restaurants.

culturalTips.title: Temple Visit Etiquette
culturalTips.content: When visiting Buddhist temples, remove hats, dress modestly, and avoid loud conversations. Photography may be restricted in some areas.

culturalTips.title: Dragon Gate Grottoes
culturalTips.content: The Longmen Grottoes were carved over 400 years during the Northern Wei and Tang dynasties. They represent the pinnacle of Chinese stone carving art.

culturalTips.title: Ancient City Walls
culturalTips.content: Luoyang's old city walls and gates like Lizheng Gate and Yingtian Gate offer glimpses into the city's imperial past.

culturalTips.title: Legend of Baimen
culturalTips.content: The legend of the White Horse carrying Buddhist scriptures from India to China gave White Horse Temple its name and marked Buddhism's official entry into China.

culturalTips.title: Luoyang Tri-color Pottery
culturalTips.content: Tang tri-color glazed pottery (唐三彩) is famous from the Tang Dynasty. These ceramic pieces typically feature vibrant glazes in brown, yellow, and green.

emergencyContacts.name: 河南科技大学第一附属医院
emergencyContacts.nameEn: First Affiliated Hospital of Henan University of Science and Technology
